title: HPAP Processing Protocol
author: Michael Betts
materials: For long term storage, store in liquid nitrogen

steps.title: Spin down vials at 2000rpm for 15min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Spin down vials at 2000rpm for 15min at room temperature

steps.title: Aliquot plasma into cryovials and freeze...
steps.instruction: Aliquot plasma into cryovials and freeze and store at -80 °C ; toss remaining plasma

steps.title: Measure volume of spun down blood...
steps.instruction: Measure volume of spun down blood and transfer to a new conical tube

steps.title: Using a 1:1 ratio of spun...
steps.instruction: Using a 1:1 ratio of spun blood to R10 media, wash vials and transfer to the conical with the spun down blood a. R10 media = RPMI + 10% fetal bovine serum + 2mM L-Glutamine + 100 U/mL Penicillin + 100 μg/mL Streptomycin

steps.title: In a SepMate™-50 conical, add 15...
steps.instruction: In a SepMate™-50 conical, add 15 mL of ficoll below the physical barrier

steps.title: Slowly add the blood to the...
steps.instruction: Slowly add the blood to the top of the ficoll, taking care not to mix the two

steps.title: Spin down at 1200 g for 10min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Spin down at 1200 g for 10min at room temperature

steps.title: Once separated, pour the supernatant with...
steps.instruction: Once separated, pour the supernatant with the PBMCs into a fresh conical

steps.title: Spin down at 500 g for 7min
steps.instruction: Spin down at 500 g for 7min

steps.title: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the...
steps.instruction: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the pellet in ~2mL ACK Lysis buffer

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5min...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5min and then quench with 18 mL R10 media

steps.title: Spin down at 500 g for 7min
steps.instruction: Spin down at 500 g for 7min

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 10 mL of media
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 10 mL of media

steps.title: Spin down at 500 g for 7min
steps.instruction: Spin down at 500 g for 7min

steps.title: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the...
steps.instruction: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the pellet in FBS + 10% DMSO at 5-10 million cells per mL

steps.title: Freeze in 1 mL aliquots at...
steps.instruction: Freeze in 1 mL aliquots at -80 °C in a Mr. Frosty freezing container for 24-48hrs

steps.title: Prepare media by adding 50 µL...
steps.instruction: Prepare media by adding 50 µL DNase + 50 mL R10 media into one conical for each tissue type

steps.title: Weigh tissue in a culture dish and record mass
steps.instruction: Weigh tissue in a culture dish and record mass

steps.title: Add 10 mL of prepared media to the culture dish
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL of prepared media to the culture dish

steps.title: Place tissue in dish and gently cut away the fat
steps.instruction: Place tissue in dish and gently cut away the fat

steps.title: Rinse with 10 mL of prepared media
steps.instruction: Rinse with 10 mL of prepared media

steps.title: For histology
steps.instruction: For histology: a. Cut off a small piece of tissue (~1-2cm) and place in 50 mL freshly prepared PBS + 4% PFA solution b. Write date and time on the tube and store for ~24hrs at RT c. Transfer to 50 mL conical with 80% EtOH and store at 4 °C

steps.title: Place tissue pieces in a 70μm...
steps.instruction: Place tissue pieces in a 70μm cell strainer and grind the tissue with the top end of a 5 mL syringe

steps.title: Strain media in plate through the...
steps.instruction: Strain media in plate through the cell strainer into a fresh 50 mL conical

steps.title: Rinse plate several times with remaining...
steps.instruction: Rinse plate several times with remaining media and strain through the cell strainer into the conical

steps.title: Spin down at 500 g for 7min
steps.instruction: Spin down at 500 g for 7min

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 10 mL of R10 media
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 10 mL of R10 media

steps.title: Spin down at 500 g for 7min
steps.instruction: Spin down at 500 g for 7min

steps.title: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the...
steps.instruction: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the pellet in FBS + 10% DMSO at 5-10 million cells per mL

steps.title: Freeze in 1 mL aliquots at...
steps.instruction: Freeze in 1 mL aliquots at -80 °C in a Mr. Frosty freezing container for 24-48hrs

steps.title: Prepare media by adding 50 µL...
steps.instruction: Prepare media by adding 50 µL DNase + 50 µL Collagenase + 50 mL R10 media 2 . Weigh tissue in a culture dish and record mass

steps.title: Cut tissue into ~2cm pieces
steps.instruction: Cut tissue into ~2cm pieces

steps.title: Dissociate using a gentleMACS with the...
steps.instruction: Dissociate using a gentleMACS with the tissue suspended in prepared media

steps.title: Incubate for 15min at 37 °C on a rotator
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15min at 37 °C on a rotator

steps.title: Repeat gentleMACS dissociation
steps.instruction: Repeat gentleMACS dissociation

steps.title: Spin down at 500 g for 10min
steps.instruction: Spin down at 500 g for 10min

steps.title: Pour off supernatant and mix in ~10mL ACK Lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Pour off supernatant and mix in ~10mL ACK Lysis buffer

steps.title: Let sit for 5min and then...
steps.instruction: Let sit for 5min and then quench with 40 mL of R10 media

steps.title: Spin down vials at 500 g...
steps.instruction: Spin down vials at 500 g for 10min at room temperature

steps.title: Add 10 mL ficoll to a clean 50 mL conical
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL ficoll to a clean 50 mL conical

steps.title: Resuspend cells and very carefully add...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells and very carefully add to the top of the ficoll

steps.title: Spin down at 2200rpm for 20min with the brake off
steps.instruction: Spin down at 2200rpm for 20min with the brake off

steps.title: Resuspend cells with 10 mL of R10 media
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells with 10 mL of R10 media

steps.title: Dilute 10 µL of the suspension...
steps.instruction: Dilute 10 µL of the suspension in 990 µL of PBS

steps.title: Count cells and multiply by 1000...
steps.instruction: Count cells and multiply by 1000 to obtain the final cell count

steps.title: Spin down at 500 g for 10min
steps.instruction: Spin down at 500 g for 10min

steps.title: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the...
steps.instruction: Pour off supernatant and resuspend the pellet in 20-30mL FBS + 10% DMSO

steps.title: Freeze in 20-30 aliquots at -80 °C in a Mr
steps.instruction: Freeze in 20-30 aliquots at -80 °C in a Mr. Frosty freezing container for 24-48hrs
